actions.intent: Commit to the lower water-near puppy first, even though the upper rescue looks cleaner.
Finish opening the lower puppy before the first water rise can punish the wrong rescue order.
Pivot to the safer upper puppy after the urgent lower puppy has extracted.
Open the final upper rescue side and complete the intended lower-first extraction order.

notes: Designer-approved intended path, not merely any solver-found win.
